chapters.title: City Celebration
chapters.content: Every winter, the city celebrated the Festival of Lights. Streets were decorated with lanterns, music played everywhere, and families gathered outside.

chapters.title: Traditional Dance
chapters.content: Maya watched performers in traditional clothes dance in the main square. The celebration felt both joyful and deeply connected to history.

chapters.title: One Lantern
chapters.content: Before leaving, she lit a small lantern and made a wish. In that moment, the entire night felt magical.
